name: Kissflow
description: Kissflow — low-code platform unifying workflow, process, project, and case management. Citizen-developer friendly with visual form builder.

seo.title: Kissflow — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Kissflow: Kissflow — low-code platform unifying workflow, process, project, and case management. Citizen-developer friendly with visual form builder.

when_to_use: Low-code approval workflow replacing manual email chains
Citizen-developer built expense and travel request portal
Case management app for operations without IT involvement
Unified process management combining forms and project boards
Vendor onboarding workflow with multi-step conditional logic

cons: Pricing jumps fast for enterprise features
UI feels less polished than Monday.com
review.verdict: Decent mid-market low-code for ops teams, but competes against stronger brands at both ends of the market.
review.best_for: Ops and HR teams building approvals and structured workflows without coders
review.not_for: Engineering-heavy teams wanting code-first platforms or deep custom logic
